description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: pre-build, build, and deploy, using the node:latest Docker image and a docker:19.03.1-dind service for both jobs. Add a download_deps_npm job in the pre-build stage that runs npm install, stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact, and is tagged npm. Add a run_infopack job in the build stage that depends on download_deps_npm, runs npm start, and publishes the output_files/ directory as an artifact named output_files, also using the npm tag. No caches, rules, or deployment steps are defined.
